name: Chart
description: Data visualization. Delegates to a D3 pattern in build-helpers/d3-patterns/ based on chartEngine field. Slot-level data drives the chart; text stays editable if fonts align with Figma.

slots.description: Pattern-specific data array. See build-helpers/d3-patterns/<pattern>.js for shape.
One of: d3-data-table, d3-flow-diagram, d3-comparison-columns, d3-bar-chart, d3-gantt-timeline, d3-donut-chart
